mill.name: Mill
mill.description: Place and move pieces to form mills of three. Remove opponent pieces — last one standing wins.
mill.hint_place_my: Your turn — click an empty point to place a piece ({n} left)
mill.hint_select: Your turn — select one of your pieces to move
mill.hint_move: Now click where to move — or pick a different piece
mill.hint_remove_opp: {player} formed a mill — they must remove one of your pieces…
mill.how_to_play:
Each player places 9 pieces one at a time on the 24 intersections, taking turns.
Whenever you complete a mill (three in a row along any line), remove one opponent piece — pieces inside a mill are protected unless all opponent pieces are milled.
Once all pieces are placed, players slide pieces along the lines one step per turn.
A player reduced to exactly 3 pieces may jump to any empty point (flying).
Win by reducing your opponent to fewer than 3 pieces, or leaving them with no legal move.
